metadata.title: Nano Banana 2 - AI Image Generator & Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: Nano Banana 2 by Google. Gemini 3.1 Flash Image model with lightning-fast speed, Pro-level quality, accurate text rendering, and strong character consistency. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image.

hero.title: Nano Banana 2
hero.description: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Image model. Lightning-fast speed with Pro-level quality, accurate text rendering, and strong character consistency for scalable image workflows.

introduce.title: About Nano Banana 2
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Meet Nano Banana 2, Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Image model, now available via Kie AI API. Built for developers with lightning-fast speed and Pro-level quality.

items.title: Lightning Fast
items.description: Optimized for speed with rapid inference times, perfect for high-volume and real-time applications.

items.title: Pro-Level Quality
items.description: Delivers professional-grade image quality rivaling larger, more resource-intensive models.

items.title: Accurate Text Rendering
items.description: Excellent text rendering capabilities for images containing typography and written content.

items.title: Character Consistency
items.description: Strong character consistency across multiple generations, ideal for storytelling and branding.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Nano Banana 2 ideal for scalable image workflows.

items.title: Dual Generation Modes
items.description: Supports both text-to-image generation and image-to-image editing for versatile creative workflows.

items.title: Scalable Workflows
items.description: Designed for high-volume applications with consistent quality across batch processing.

items.title: Developer Friendly
items.description: Easy API integration with comprehensive documentation for seamless implementation.

items.title: Cost Efficient
items.description: Optimized pricing model for developers and businesses requiring high-volume generation.

items.title: Style Versatility
items.description: Support for diverse artistic styles and visual aesthetics for various creative needs.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated and edited images, suitable for business use.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Nano Banana 2.

items.title: High-Volume Content
items.description: Generate large batches of images for content platforms, social media, and marketing campaigns.

items.title: Real-Time Applications
items.description: Power real-time image generation in applications requiring instant visual feedback.

items.title: Character Design
items.description: Create consistent character designs for games, animations, and storytelling projects.

items.title: E-commerce
items.description: Generate product images and lifestyle shots at scale for online retail platforms.

items.title: Social Media
items.description: Create engaging visual content for social media platforms with fast turnaround.

items.title: Prototyping
items.description: Rapid visual prototyping for design concepts and creative exploration.

items.title: What is Nano Banana 2?
items.description: Nano Banana 2 is Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Image model, optimized for speed and quality with accurate text rendering and strong character consistency.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Nano Banana 2 supports both Text To Image (generating images from text descriptions) and Image To Image (editing and transforming existing images).

items.title: How fast is Nano Banana 2?
items.description: Nano Banana 2 is optimized for lightning-fast inference, delivering results in seconds for most generation tasks.

items.title: Is it good for batch processing?
items.description: Yes! Nano Banana 2 is designed for scalable workflows with consistent quality across high-volume generation.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images generated or edited with Nano Banana 2 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What makes it different from other models?
items.description: Nano Banana 2 combines speed, quality, and cost-efficiency, making it ideal for developers and businesses requiring scalable image generation.

cta.title: Ready to Try Nano Banana 2?
cta.description: Experience Google's lightning-fast image generation model. Create stunning visuals with speed and quality.
